ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conflict_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conflict event */,
  "conflict_unscaled" INTEGER /* Unscaled number of conflict events */,
  "conflict_monthly" INTEGER /* Number of conflict events in the same month */,
  "is_partial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is partial (True, False, or None) */,
  "scale" REAL /* Scaling factor for the conflict intensity */,
  "conflict_scaled" REAL /* Scaled number of conflict events */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the conflict event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the conflict event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the conflict event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict event (e.g., battle, explosion, protest) */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the conflict event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conflict event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the location is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., on-the-ground reports, satellite imagery, social media) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sources" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, policymaker, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "event_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_type_conflict_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "event_type_id")
)
